animations.css_only_rules: Strictly NO Framer Motion. Use pure CSS @keyframes and Tailwind transition utilities.
animations.custom_keyframes: Add float, pulse-glow, and slide-up animations in index.css

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Persistent top header. Glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#030605]/80 border-b border-[#149d80]/20). Contains Logo, Nav Links, and persistent Sign In / Sign Up buttons.

components.name: Hero Section
components.description: High-impact hero. Deep dark background with abstract glass image. Liquid-glass overlay. Massive typography emphasizing 'Industrial Foundations'. Teal primary CTA.
components.layout: Grid cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 with text on left and abstract visual on right or asymmetrical bento.

components.name: 6-Step Developer Onboarding
components.description: A vertical or bento-grid timeline connecting 6 steps. Visuals must resemble 'Steel Girders' (e.g., solid 2px borders acting as a spine). Include code blocks in JetBrains Mono inside glass panels.

components.name: Security Vault Showcase
components.description: Feature section resembling a high-tech vault. Focus on '260+ Fraud Detectors' and '160+ Countries' metrics. Use heavy glassmorphism cards. Dark, moody, secure vibe.

components.name: Glassmorphism Auth Cards
components.description: Visual-only showcase for Sign In / Sign Up. Extremely high blur panels (backdrop-blur-3xl). Can be placed in a side-by-side layout or floating as absolute elements in a showcase block.

components.name: Contact Page
components.description: Enterprise-grade contact form. Nested inside a liquid-glass container. Inputs should have subtle teal borders on focus.

components.name: Footer
components.description: Massive spacing (py-32). Dark steel gradient background. Large 'Let's Build' CTA and grid of links.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.
DO NOT USE Framer Motion. Add @keyframes to index.css for float, pulse, slide-up, etc. Use standard CSS classes.
Strictly adhere to the dark theme 'Jewel & Luxury' archetype using #149d80 teal accents over #030605 backgrounds.
Apply 'liquid-glass' effect heavily. Example: className='backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#08120F]/60 border border-[#149d80]/20'.
Primary call to action buttons must use the #149d80 color and have a distinct glow on hover.
Copy should reflect industrial metaphors: Girders, Vaults, Steel Foundations, Enterprise Grade.
For the 6-Step Onboarding, use a timeline structure with vertical borders representing steel girders. Add numbers 01 to 06.
Ensure every single interactive element, form field, and button has a proper data-testid.
Make sure the navbar is sticky with high z-index and blurred background.
Images provided in the guidelines should be used with max overlay opacities (bg-black/40) so they remain visible.
